turns.speaker: D
turns.text: judy gomez , mrn 869723 . date of birth , 5 , 7 , 1961 . judy gomez is in office today for ongoing management of psoriatic arthritis . hello , judy , how is judy gomez doing today ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: judy gomez is doing good , thank you . how is the doctor ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: the doctor is great , thanks . so how has judy gomez been since the last time ? the doctor knows the last time the doctor and judy gomez were talking about decreasing judy gomez's prednisone dose , correct ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes . judy gomez is just on one prednisone pill now and one prednisone pill seems to be enough .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: aw , that's great to hear .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , there were a couple days there judy gomez took an extra prednisone pill , just because there was a little extra pain in judy gomez's feet . and judy gomez does have a desk job , so when judy gomez has a day off where judy gomez is moving around a lot judy gomez's feet do tend to hurt a bit more .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . how many times did judy gomez do taking an extra prednisone pill ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: um , taking an extra prednisone pill was n't often , maybe once a week .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . so discontinuing the prednisone sounds like the doctor and judy gomez are still on track for discontinuing the prednisone . the doctor will do discontinuing the prednisone today and judy gomez can let the doctor know how discontinuing the prednisone goes on judy gomez's next visit . and how about the methotrexate , does judy gomez think that methotrexate helped with judy gomez's joint pain ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , definitely . because judy gomez went to get judy gomez's covid shots , um , but from the letter judy gomez got about the methotrexate , the letter said that methotrexate could interfere with the vaccine , you know , reduce the efficacy . so judy gomez did n't take methotrexate on the week that judy gomez got the first shot .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and what happened ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: judy gomez felt absolutely horrible until judy gomez took methotrexate again a week later .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: the doctor is sorry to hear that . and- and what did judy gomez do about the second dose ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: well , judy gomez called into the hotline because judy gomez was in so much pain with the first shot . and the hotline said , " no , just go ahead and take methotrexate , " so judy gomez did .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . that's good then . the doctor and judy gomez do have to keep an eye out on methotrexate since methotrexate is a high-risk medication . does judy gomez have an appointment to get judy gomez's blood drawn for the next time ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , the clinic staff did n't give judy gomez an appointment to get judy gomez's blood drawn .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . so the doctor can do scheduling an appointment to get judy gomez's blood drawn for judy gomez too . uhm , so what questions does judy gomez have for the doctor , judy ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: well , judy gomez just wanted to know why judy gomez was getting all these bruises here , so like when judy gomez bumps judy gomez . judy gomez does n't know where the bruises are coming from .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . the bruising is probably from the prednisone , prednisone can increase bruising .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay . judy gomez did n't know that prednisone can increase bruising . um , judy gomez does n't even feel the bruising when the bruising happens , the bruises just show up .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yeah . unfortunately increased bruising can happen , but the doctor and judy gomez are working on discontinuing prednisone so let's see if the bruises do go away .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay . discontinuing prednisone sounds good , thanks .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , judy , please , um , sit up here and the doctor will take a look . shoes and socks off please .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: all right .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right . the doctor will see here . okay . so where is judy gomez hurting ? in judy gomez's joints right here ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , a little . also in judy gomez's feet joints as well .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and how about when judy gomez bends the knee like this ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: well , bending the knee like this hurt before the doctor and judy gomez increased the methotrexate , but bending the knee like this is doing pretty good now .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , good . can judy gomez flex judy gomez's toes please ? good range of motion . also ridges in nails , that's from the psoriasis .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah . judy gomez's nails have been like that for a long time now .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right , uhm , ms gomez , it looks like the doctor and judy gomez are moving along with judy gomez's treatment nicely . the doctor will stop judy gomez's prednisone and continue with the methotrexate . make sure to stop by the front desk and make an appointment for the blood work , and the doctor will see judy gomez in three months .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: all right . the plan sounds good . thank you so much , it was great to see the doctor .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: it was great seeing judy gomez too . thank you .

plan to discontinue/stop prednisone

patient held methotrexate for the week of first COVID shot due to concern about vaccine efficacy, then resumed; described as high-risk medication requiring blood monitoring; plan is to continue methotrexate
Patient reports clinic staff did not give an appointment; doctor can schedule an appointment for blood draw.
Bending the knee hurt before methotrexate was increased; now doing pretty good.
Feet tend to hurt more on days off when moving around a lot; patient took an extra prednisone pill on a couple days due to extra foot pain.
Doctor attributed ridges in nails to psoriasis.
Patient got the first shot; discussed second dose. Patient held methotrexate the week of the first shot due to concern about reduced vaccine efficacy.
In office today for ongoing management of psoriatic arthritis.
Ongoing management.
When moving around a lot on a day off, feet tend to hurt more.
Patient will let the doctor know how discontinuing prednisone goes on the next visit.
Felt absolutely horrible until taking methotrexate again a week later.
In so much pain with the first shot.

attributes.procedure_outcome: Hotline advised to go ahead and take methotrexate; patient did.

attributes.notes: Bruises show up after bumping into things; patient does not feel bruising when it happens. Clinician stated bruising is probably from prednisone and plan is to discontinue prednisone to see if bruises go away.
Occurs in context of bruises appearing when the patient bumps into things.
Pain with bending the knee hurt before methotrexate was increased; bending the knee is doing pretty good now.
Dose was increased; plan is to continue methotrexate.
Provider asked patient to flex toes; noted good range of motion.
Ridges in nails attributed to psoriasis; nails have been like that for a long time.
Doctor will stop prednisone, continue methotrexate, and patient to make appointment for blood work; follow-up in three months.
Patient instructed to stop by the front desk to make an appointment for blood work.
